meta.title: ONLYMORE GROUP — Optimize Your Legacy
meta.description: French financial inclusion group through sport. 5 subsidiaries serving 3 fights: reducing poverty, stopping brain drain, combating forced emigration.

hero.title: Optimize Your Legacy.
hero.why: The mutualist infrastructure. Built for the many. Powered by sport.
hero.subtitle: 5 entities. 220 years of mutualism. 6 UN Global Goals.

mandela.quote: Sport has the power to change the world. It has the power to inspire. It has the power to unite people like few other things.
mandela.author: Nelson Mandela, Laureus World Sports Awards, 2000

boetcker.quote: You cannot help the poor by destroying the rich. You cannot help men permanently by doing for them what they could and should do for themselves.
boetcker.author: William J.H. Boetcker

founder.quote: Forced to find financial solutions because I was too disabled to work, not enough for a pension, and too young to be operated on... I transformed my exclusion into a mission: that no one lives what I have lived.
founder.author: Florent Gibert, Founder & CEO

infinity.title: One symbol. A whole world.
infinity.tagline: No beginning. No end. The local economy in perpetual motion.

colhybri.desc: SaaS solidarity commerce platform. Own Your Neighborhood. Own Your Future.

crownium.desc: Mutualist funding for professional sports clubs.

poverty.title: Reduce poverty
poverty.desc: Sport generates local wealth, creating economic opportunities where they are needed most.

talent.title: Stop brain drain
talent.desc: Dynamic local ecosystems allow talent to flourish without having to leave.

emigration.title: Combat forced emigration
emigration.desc: When a city thrives economically, no one is forced to leave it.

flow.4: No one is forced to leave

florent.bio: Self-taught, based in Rodilhan (Occitanie), maternal roots in Marseille, ex-construction and delivery, kung fu on Mondays, karate on Thursdays

investors.title: Investors
investors.description: ONLYMORE Group is currently raising a pre-seed round of €200K-€350K at a pre-money valuation of €1.3M-€2.15M.

footer.slogan: The mutualist infrastructure. Built for the many. Powered by sport.

stats.drain: €4.2B annual talent drain in European football
stats.parliament: EU Parliament: 552 votes, 86.4% for cooperative model
stats.uefa: UEFA Squad Cost Rule: 70% cap on squad costs, validating CROWNIUM's revenue model

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.description: Publisher, host and legal information of ONLYMORE Group.
mentions.editor_body: The website onlymore.group is published by Florent Gibert, founder of the ONLYMORE Group project, a simplified joint-stock company (SAS) currently being incorporated. Name: Florent Gibert. Address: Rodilhan (30230), Occitanie, France. Contact: contact@onlymore.group. Publication director: Florent Gibert. Once ONLYMORE Group SAS is officially registered with the Nîmes Commercial Register, this page will be updated.
mentions.ip_body: The entire site, including its structure, texts, images, logo, trademarks (ONLYMORE, COLHYBRI, CROWNIUM, DOJUKU SHINGI, PLUMAYA) and software, is the exclusive property of ONLYMORE Group, unless otherwise indicated. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation, in whole or in part, by any means whatsoever, without the prior written authorization of ONLYMORE Group, is strictly prohibited.
mentions.liability_body: The information on this site is provided for indicative purposes. ONLYMORE Group makes every effort to ensure its accuracy but cannot be held liable for errors, omissions or results obtained from misuse of this information. This site does not constitute a solicitation to invest. Any fundraising is governed by applicable financial law.
mentions.law_body: This site and its legal notice are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of the site falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Nîmes.
mentions.contact_body: For any question regarding this legal notice

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: ONLYMORE Group personal data protection, GDPR compliant.
privacy.rgpd_notice: Compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.
privacy.controller_body: The data controller is ONLYMORE Group, a simplified joint-stock company (SAS) currently being incorporated, in the process of being registered with the Nîmes Commercial Register, whose registered office is located in Rodilhan (30230), Occitanie, France. The controller is represented by its founder and publication director, Florent Gibert.
privacy.purpose_intro: We collect and process your personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.purpose_1: Responding to contact requests (investors, press, partners)
privacy.purpose_2: Managing investor relationships (authorized prospecting, Calendly meetings, follow-up)
privacy.purpose_3: Measuring site audience via Plausible Analytics (no cookie, no personal data)
privacy.purpose_4: Sending, on request, institutional information (newsletter, communications)
privacy.purpose_5: Complying with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.legal_1: Explicit consent (GDPR Article 6.1.a): newsletter, meeting request
privacy.legal_2: Legitimate interest (GDPR Article 6.1.f): audience measurement, site security
privacy.legal_3: Performance of pre-contractual measures (GDPR Article 6.1.b): investor exchanges
privacy.legal_4: Legal obligation (GDPR Article 6.1.c): retention of accounting records
privacy.data_1: Identity: last name, first name, position, company
privacy.data_2: Contact details: email address, phone (optional), LinkedIn
privacy.data_3: Content of exchanges: messages, possible attachments
privacy.data_4: Anonymized technical data: country, device type, page visited (via Plausible, no IP stored)
privacy.retention_1: Investor data: 3 years after last interaction
privacy.retention_2: B2B prospecting data: 3 years after last contact
privacy.retention_5: Accounting and legal archives: applicable legal durations
privacy.recipients_intro: Your data is accessible only to authorized persons of ONLYMORE Group and to our technical subprocessors:
privacy.recipient_2: Plausible Analytics (audience measurement, EU servers, no cookie)
privacy.recipient_3: Calendly (meeting booking, only if you consent)
privacy.recipient_4: Cloudflare Turnstile (anti-spam on forms, no tracking cookie)
privacy.transfers_body: Data hosted on Vercel is stored in the eu-west-3 (Paris) region. No transfer of personal data outside the European Economic Area is made without appropriate safeguards (European Commission standard contractual clauses).
privacy.rights_intro: In accordance with articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.right_1: Right of access to your data
privacy.right_3: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
privacy.right_5: Right to portability of your data
privacy.right_6: Right to object, particularly to prospecting
privacy.right_7: Right to set post mortem directives
privacy.right_8: Right to withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.rights_how: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.complaint_body: If, after contacting us, you consider that your rights are not respected, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the French Data Protection Authority (CNIL)
privacy.security_body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data: HTTPS/TLS encryption, content security policy (CSP), restricted access, logging. A security vulnerability can be reported to
privacy.changes_body: This policy may evolve. The version in force is the one published on this page, with its update date.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.description: Terms of use applicable to browsing onlymore.group.
terms.object_body: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the onlymore.group site, the institutional site of ONLYMORE Group (SAS). This site is a showcase site of a holding company and its 5 subsidiaries. It offers neither financial transactions nor online service contracts.
terms.acceptance_body: Access to the site constitutes full acceptance of these Terms. If you disagree, please refrain from accessing the site.
terms.access_body: The site is freely accessible 24/7, except in the event of maintenance, force majeure or events beyond the control of ONLYMORE Group. ONLYMORE Group does not guarantee absolute availability and cannot be held liable for temporary unavailability.
terms.ip_body: All content of the site (texts, images, logos, videos, structure, source code, trademarks ONLYMORE, COLHYBRI, CROWNIUM, DOJUKU SHINGI, PLUMAYA) is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation, modification, exploitation or redistribution, in whole or in part, without prior written authorization, is prohibited and would constitute counterfeiting punishable by articles L.335-2 et seq. of the French Intellectual Property Code.
terms.conduct_intro: The user undertakes to use the site in accordance with applicable laws. In particular, the user shall not:
terms.conduct_1: Access or attempt to access reserved areas
terms.conduct_2: Undermine the integrity of the site (virus, mass scraping, denial of service)
terms.conduct_3: Disseminate any content contrary to public order or morality
terms.liability_body: Information published on the site is provided for informational purposes. It constitutes neither a solicitation to invest, nor investment advice, nor financial canvassing. ONLYMORE Group cannot be held liable for any use of this information contrary to its institutional purpose. Links to third-party sites are provided as a convenience and ONLYMORE Group declines all responsibility as to their content.
terms.data_body: The processing of personal data is described in our
terms.changes_body: ONLYMORE Group reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes are enforceable against the user as soon as they are posted online.
terms.law_body: These Terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, exclusive jurisdiction is given to the courts of Nîmes, subject to mandatory provisions applicable to consumers.
terms.contact_body: For any question regarding these Terms

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.description: ONLYMORE Group cookie policy: one essential cookie only, no trackers.
cookies.intro_body: ONLYMORE Group rejects advertising tracking. The onlymore.group site uses only one cookie, strictly necessary to remember your language. No analytics cookie, no advertising cookie, no third-party tracker is placed on your device without your explicit consent.
cookies.essential_note: Cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the site are exempt from consent under article 82 of the French Data Protection Act.
cookies.analytics_body: We use Plausible Analytics, a European audience analysis solution without cookies. No personal data is collected, no IP is stored, no user profile is built. The data is aggregated and anonymous.
cookies.third_intro: Some features load third-party scripts, only after explicit action on your part:
cookies.third_1: Calendly (investor meeting booking), loaded only after clicking the button
cookies.third_2: Cloudflare Turnstile (anti-spam on forms), no tracking cookie
cookies.manage_body: You can at any time delete cookies stored in your browser via its settings. Note: deleting the NEXT_LOCALE cookie will result in re-detection of your preferred language on your next visit.
cookies.more_body: For more information on the processing of your data
